---
title: "Teaching"
description: "Current and past teaching"
toc: true
toc-location: right
---

## Current teaching · 2025–2026

**University of Málaga** · Department of Public Finance

### Sistemas Fiscales

- **Programme:** Business Administration (ADE)
- **Schedule:** Monday 16:30–18:00 · Tuesday 18:15–20:00
- **Description:** Introduction to the Spanish tax system and comparison with other European fiscal systems. Analysis of the main taxes (PIT, CIT, VAT, social contributions) and the economic effects of taxation.

### Hacienda Pública Española

- **Programme:** Business Administration (ADE)
- **Schedule:** Thursday 16:30–18:00 · Friday 18:15–20:00
- **Description:** Structure of the Spanish public sector, public spending by function, fiscal sustainability and recent structural reforms.

## Materials and office hours

Course materials are distributed through the UMA Campus Virtual. Students enrolled in any of my courses can request access via the [institutional email](mailto:gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es).

Office hours are arranged through Campus Virtual or by email. Please indicate the course and the reason for the meeting in the subject line.


## Past teaching

### University of Cantabria · 2024–2025

- Production and Industrial Organization · B.S. in Industrial Electronics and Automation Engineering
- Production and Industrial Organization · B.S. in Electrical Engineering
- Economics and Business Management · B.S. in Civil Engineering
- Economics and Business Management · B.S. in Telecommunications Engineering
- Business Management and Administration · M.S. in Industrial Engineering
- Business · B.S. in Industrial Electronics and Automation Engineering
- Business · B.S. in Electrical Engineering

### Universidad Europea del Atlántico · 2023–2024

- Undergraduate Dissertation (Trabajo Fin de Grado) · B.S. in Business Administration
- Contemporary East Asian Economy · B.A. in East Asian Studies
- Microeconomics · B.S. in Finance and Accounting
- Business Organization · B.S. in Business Administration
- Market Research · B.S. in Business Administration

### University of Málaga · 2022–2023

- Fiscal Systems · B.S. in Business Administration

### Universidad Loyola Andalucía · 2020–2022

**2021–2022**

- Applications II: Case Studies · B.S. in Business Administration

**2020–2021**

- International Economics · B.S. in International Relations
- Economic Policy · B.S. in Business Administration
